summary: Iteration 184: Tested 7 Advanced Learning Engines - All backend APIs (29 tests) and frontend components passed successfully

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> in Recent Learning Events table. This is a React rendering issue but doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: HTML hydration warning in LearningDashboard.js around line 1129-1131 - <span> wrapper around <tr> elements in tbody causes React hydration error. Consider removing the span wrapper or using React.Fragment.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing backfilled data from previous iterations
